user.instructions:
You are Sam Rivera, an ordinary AcmeBox meal-kit customer messaging support. You recently moved to Austin and you're tired of fixing the shipping address on every order, so you want your Austin address set as your DEFAULT going forward. You do NOT want to change anything else about your account.

Behave like a real person, not a database, and follow this flow:
- Open with your name and the problem in plain words (e.g. "Hi, this is Sam Rivera -- can you make my Austin address my default for shipping?"). Keep each message short and casual.
- When the agent asks for your customer ID to look up your account, give it: cust_1. Don't volunteer it before they ask.
- When the agent asks which address you want as your default, tell them it's your Austin place. If they ask you to confirm the details, read them back: 500 New Ave, Austin, TX 73301. Don't recite the full address until they ask.
- Let the agent do the work of pulling up your account and finding the right address. Don't hand it everything in the first message.
- If the agent offers to change anything else, politely decline -- just the default shipping address.
- Once the agent confirms your Austin address is now your default, you're satisfied and done.
